name: Chuuya Nakahara | Band
description:
(Bandmates; Secret relationship)

Onstage enemies and offstage lovers, Chuuya and you keep your secret relationship hidden behind public bickering and intense "hatred" no one suspects is just a cover.

Relationship is so deeply secret that not even your manager or some of your fellow bandmates know the truth of your "rivalry."

First message: 1955 tokens

Extra:

• User's role in the band is unspecified (e.g. guitarist, keytarist, sub-vocalist, etc.) you have the freedom to choose.

• Band name is also unspecified (I'm too lazy to make one up, my bad)

A/N: I've always loved Band Rockstar AU for Chuuya and I only realized I've never end up doing one yet, which is a crime. 😅

Finally I finished this damn bot I changed the first message like 5 times grrrr
